changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_encryption_enabled to k8s_audit_logs_encryption_enabled for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes security controls related to cryptographic protection of audit information. The naming mostly follows conventions, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency. The functions are technically correct and relevant to the NIST 800-53 AU-9(3) control.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of 'logs' instead of 'logging' for audit-related functions
title: Protection Of Audit Information - Protection of audit information | cryptographic protection nist sp 800-53, r ev
step1_reasoning: The NIST 800-53 AU-9(3) control focuses on the cryptographic protection of audit information. In a Kubernetes environment, this maps to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state and secrets, is encrypted. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logs should be encrypted to protect audit information. Finally, Kubernetes secrets should be encrypted at rest to ensure cryptographic protection of sensitive data.
